strategic_objective: Clarify the nature and impact of the extreme class-conditioned distribution skew in the Destination Port feature.
key_checks: Verify if zero entropy in DDoS destination ports corresponds to a single or very few targeted ports
Assess if the dominant ratio of 1.0 is consistent across data partitions or a sampling artifact
Evaluate potential shortcut-like predictive leverage of Destination Port for DDoS class
Examine stability of model behavior when excluding or perturbing Destination Port feature
success_criteria: Evidence supports whether the distribution skew is a genuine network pattern or data artifact
Identification of any shortcut-like risk posed by Destination Port feature
Clear understanding of how this feature’s distribution affects model robustness and generalization
router_constraints: preserve feature scope on Destination Port
preserve evidence refs related to distribution and entropy (e33)
